category_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/sparfenyuk/mcp-proxy describes transport switching between stdio, SSE, and Streamable HTTP.
source_facts.description says this bridges Streamable HTTP and stdio MCP transports.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use mcp-proxy: https://github.com/sparfenyuk/mcp-proxy
docs_sources: No separate official docs site found; official GitHub README contains configuration, examples, installation, and command-line arguments.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: Official README documents stdio-to-SSE/StreamableHTTP and SSE-to-stdio proxy modes.
source_facts.description names Streamable HTTP and stdio MCP transports.
